name: Jay Inslee
subject: Waging a war on our Earth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
No one and nothing can stop our progress. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA3MTE2NjgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMjI3NzAyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend, President Trump's policies will poison our Earth. First he went after our civil liberties, and then our health care. Now just a few hours ago, Trump and his billionaire-class friends set their sights on the planet. Today, President Trump signed an executive order repealing most of President Obama's climate policies -- including the Clean Power Plan. Trump's proposed budget cuts millions from the EPA. And he's hired the most anti-science cabinet in recent history. So, while Donald Trump sends Washington D.C. backward, I'm going to make sure we keep pressing forward. **Our progress is not going to be stopped by anyone, especially this president.** That's why last week I went to New York to speak at the United Nations climate conference and make it clear that, despite Trump's actions, we're going to continue to take on climate change and build a clean energy economy for our people. And today I need your help to get the word out. [**We need to spread the word about states taking leadership against climate change -- share my speech to the United Nations with your friends and family!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA3MTE2NjgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMjI3NzAyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0) [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA3MTE2NjgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMjI3NzAyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Our commitment is not going to be diminished by anyone, at any time. That's why I proposed a budget that taxes carbon to fully fund our schools and invest in the next generation of scientists and leaders. And that's why I'm partnering with Governor Jerry Brown and Governor Kate Brown to unite the West Coast in a movement to lead on climate action. Our states have always been the laboratories of democracy in the United States system. Our states have been free to invent policies that can determine our own destinies. And now more than ever you can count on the state of Washington to move forward, because that's the only direction that we know. It's time we show the Trump administration they won't stop our progress. [**Read my speech to the United Nations and share it on Facebook today!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA3MTE2NjgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMjI3NzAyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**SHARE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTA3MTE2NjgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMjI3NzAyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: Senate Dems Must Stand United Against Neil Gorsuch for the Supreme Court
body:
No re-election funds for any Senate Democrat who helps confirm Gorsuch (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/DSCC_Gorsuch_dems/)

The petition to Democratic Senate Campaign Committee Chair Chris Van Hollen reads:
“Refuse to allocate campaign funds to any Democratic senator who votes or strikes a deal to advance the confirmation of right-wing extremist Neil Gorsuch.”

Add your name:

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/DSCC_Gorsuch_dems/)

Dear Activist,

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/DSCC_Gorsuch_dems/)

What are they thinking? A recent report indicates that some Democratic senators, including Delaware’s Chris Coons, are considering striking a backroom deal with Republicans to confirm Neil Gorsuch, Trump’s extreme-right wing pick for the Supreme Court.1 Last week, Colorado Democratic Sen. Michael Bennet heaped praise on Gorsuch when he helped introduce him to the Senate Judiciary Committee.2

Senate Democrats are the only firewall we have against a Donald Trump Supreme Court that will legitimize his hateful policies, undo decades of civil rights progress and destroy the foundations of our democracy for generations. They must stand united to block Gorsuch from being confirmed, not make nice with him and hand the court over to Trump. That means no deals and no vote to end the filibuster on Gorsuch’s confirmation.

The Democratic Party claims to stand up for women, LGBTQ people, immigrants, Muslims, people of color, workers, the environment and the bedrock principles of our democracy. If party leaders intend to act on those values, they will refuse to give financial support to Sen. Coons or any other turncoat Democratic senator who collaborates with extremist Republicans to put Gorsuch on the Supreme Court.

Tell Democratic Senate Campaign Committee Chair Chris Van Hollen to pledge not to allocate any re-election funds for Sen. Coons or any other senators who help put Neil Gorsuch on the Supreme Court. Click here to sign the petition. (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/DSCC_Gorsuch_dems/)

The Democratic Senate Campaign Committee (DSCC) is the Senate Democrats’ campaigning and fundraising arm. It is known for its prolific fundraising appeals, which have recently included direct requests for donations to help defend the Supreme Court. It would be the height of hypocrisy to use money raised to keep Gorsuch off the court to fund the re-election campaigns of senators who helped him get a lifetime appointment.

A Trump Supreme Court could institutionalize his extremism for generations. There’s no way any Senate Democrat should preemptively compromise or cave to Republican extremism and help Trump stack the court. Democrats cannot cave at a time when the FBI is actively investigating Trump and his campaign’s potential collusion with Russia to influence our presidential election. They cannot turn their backs against the massive resistance of grassroots activists who just helped to take down Trumpcare.

Progressive champion Sen. Jeff Merkley has promised to use the filibuster to force Senate Republicans to get 60 votes to advance Gorsuch’s confirmation to a final vote. Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer has now pledged to join him. Every Senate Democrat should immediately pledge to join the filibuster and refuse to collaborate with extremist Senate Republicans, either by striking a deal to confirm Gorsuch nomination or by voting for cloture to end the filibuster. And DSCC Chair Chris Van Hollen should immediately make clear that any senator who helps hand the Supreme Court to Trump will not receive re-election funds from the DSCC.

Tell DSCC Chair Van Hollen: Democrats who refuse to defend the Supreme Court from Donald Trump’s racist, fascist agenda should not receive support for their re-election. Click here to sign the petition. (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/DSCC_Gorsuch_dems/)

Trump and extremist Republicans already control two of the three branches of government, leaving the judiciary as our last and only line of defense against their hateful and dangerous agenda.

It is time for Democratic Party leaders, starting with DSCC Chair Van Hollen, to take a firm stand and draw a bright line: Senators who help advance Gorsuch’s nomination will be helping Trump attack women, people of color, Muslims, immigrants, LGBTQ people, workers and the environment. They will be turning their backs on the party’s base and the party will refuse to support their reelection.

This is why we are joining 350 Action, #AllofUs, Demand Progress, Democrats.com, Friends of the Earth Action, Other98, Presente, Social Security Works, UltraViolet Action, #VOTEPROCHOICE and our friends in the progressive movement to ramp up the pressure on Sen. Van Hollen. Click the link below to add your voice today:

https://act.credoaction.com/sign/DSCC_Gorsuch (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/DSCC_Gorsuch_dems/)

Thanks for taking action,

Heidi Hess, Senior Campaign Manager
CREDO Action from Working Assets (http://www.credoaction.com)

Add your name:

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/DSCC_Gorsuch_dems/)

References:

Burgess Everett, "Democrats weigh deal to let Gorsuch through (http://www.politico.com/story/2017/03/gorsuch-democrats-supreme-court-236384) ," Politico, March 22, 2017. Mat Flegenheimer, Carl Hulse, Charlie Savage and Adam Liptak, "Six Highlights From the Gorsuch Confirmation Hearing (https://www.nytimes.com/2017/03/20/us/politics/judge-gorsuch-supreme-court-confirmation-hearings.html) ," The New York Times, March 20, 2017.

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: Friday
body:
Let's close March strong.
---
**Our first quarterly fundraising deadline of 2017 is on Friday, and we need your help to make sure Democrats have a strong showing. Pitch in $10 or more right now.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca3c/4067b0a/2e3d71162/7e706dc4/4049088654/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170329_tp_rem&source=em_20170329_tp_rem&refcode=em_20170329_tp_rem")**
Friend --

Friday was a good day for the good guys. We won a major victory to defend the Affordable Care Act and stopped a truly disastrous Republican proposal that would have hurt millions of Americans.

**[I want us to have more days like Friday, and I'm asking for your help to do it.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca3c/4067b0a/2e3d71162/7e706dc2/4049088654/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+I+want+us+to+have+more+days+like+Friday+&utm_campaign=em_20170329_tp_rem&source=em_20170329_tp_rem&refcode=em_20170329_tp_rem")**

I've been so inspired by your unrelenting grassroots activism -- on everything from health care to Trump's Muslim ban to standing up to his Cabinet and Supreme Court nominees.

But to put a stop to Donald Trump's radical agenda for good, we're going to need to channel that energy into electoral victories.

We've got an important special election coming up soon in Georgia, where we have a chance to flip a seat in Congress from red to blue. And in November, we have some big races for governorships and state legislatures in Virginia and New Jersey.

Republicans are going to throw everything they can at us to win those races -- one Republican super PAC has already committed to spending $1.1 million in Georgia alone to send a rubber stamp for Donald Trump to Congress.

But I know we can win important races like these. In February, Democrats rallied behind Stephanie Hansen and won a special election in Delaware that preserved Democratic control of the state senate. Last week, we won an overwhelming victory in a special election for a seat in Pennsylvania's House of Representatives.

It just takes commitment -- so today, I'm asking for yours. Chip in $10 or more before our quarterly fundraising deadline on Friday, and help make sure we can give our candidates around the country everything they need to win this year.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca3c/4067b0a/2e3d71162/7e706dc0/4049088654/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-march-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170329_tp_rem&source=em_20170329_tp_rem&refcode=em_20170329_tp_rem")

[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca3c/4067b0a/2e3d71162/7e706dce/4049088654/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-march-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170329_tp_rem&source=em_20170329_tp_rem&refcode=em_20170329_tp_rem")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca3c/4067b0a/2e3d71162/7e706dcf/4049088654/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-march-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170329_tp_rem&source=em_20170329_tp_rem&refcode=em_20170329_tp_rem")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca3c/4067b0a/2e3d71162/7e706dcc/4049088654/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-march-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170329_tp_rem&source=em_20170329_tp_rem&refcode=em_20170329_tp_rem")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca3c/4067b0a/2e3d71162/7e706dcd/4049088654/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170329_tp_rem&source=em_20170329_tp_rem&refcode=em_20170329_tp_rem")

Tom

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca3c/4067b0a/2e3d71162/7e706dd3/4049088654/VEsEBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170329_tp_rem&source=em_20170329_tp_rem&refcode=em_20170329_tp_rem"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

I need your help to defend the President. |

Friend, We are working to do exactly what was promised. The American people elected President Donald Trump and Republican majorities to the House and Senate because they wanted real change. But, the FAKE NEWS media has been attacking every effort to: Create a stronger American economy Strengthen our National Security Reduce red tape and regulation Return a voice to the American people
That’s why I need your help to defend the President and protect the progress of our bold America First Agenda. The FEC-mandated March deadline is only 2 days away and we’re still $124,842 away from hitting our goal. Because there’s not much time left until we have to publicly report how much money we have... ALL DONATIONS WILL BE TRIPLE-MATCHED! In keeping with the President's campaign promises, the Trump administration is stopping the drugs from flowing across the border, and today the President is hosting a listening session on drug and opioid abuse.

name: Jeff Weaver, OurRevolution.com
subject: Bernie Sanders' "Medicare for All" bill
body:
Medicare for All is the only way to solve our health care crisis
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Senator Bernie Sanders announced that he's going to be introducing a Medicare for All bill in the Senate.
We all know that the Affordable Care Act was a critically important step towards the goal of universal health care. But 29 million Americans today still do not have health insurance, and millions more are underinsured because health insurance companies are making our health care unaffordable and inaccessible.
Bernie Sanders' Medicare for All bill puts power and choice when it comes to health care decisions right where it should be -- in the hands of patients and their doctors, because nobody should be squeezed by the insurance industry's bottom line.
[**Will you join me in telling Senator Bernie Sanders "thank you" for never giving up when it comes to universal health care for all Americans? Sign the thank you card today to say that you're with him.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0ab6/43f17890/df7f4877/6203ffb8/2569224548/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/we-support-bernie-sanders-and-medicare-for-all?source=em170328-full")
I've known Senator Sanders for more than 30 years. He has championed universal health care for even longer. Bernie has always stood up for the people, even if it means going up against the establishment. The insurance industry, which spent $146 BILLION in 2016 alone lobbying Congress, will say that universal health care isn't possible. Not only is it possible*, Medicare for All is the only way to solve our health care crisis.
That's why Our Revolution is joining with communities all across the country to win this critical fight. We're supporting Rob Quist, a strong advocate for universal health care, who is running for Montana's at-large Congressional district in the upcoming special election.
This isn't some fringe issue: **58 percent of Americans support a Medicare for All system**.** Our issue is national, and it's personal. Too many Americans lie awake at night wondering how they'll pay for much-needed treatment or medications. Americans are dying of entirely preventable causes. Ensuring universal health care through a Medicare for All program is a moral imperative that we cannot ignore.
[**Join me in thanking Bernie Sanders for his leadership on Medicare for All, and say that you're all-in for universal health care.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0ab6/43f17890/df7f4877/6203ffb8/2569224548/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/we-support-bernie-sanders-and-medicare-for-all?source=em170328-full")
Keep up the fight, because together we're transforming this country.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
President
Our Revolution
\--------------------
*Medicare for All _is_ possible: [**here's a map of nations that provide universal health care for all.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0ab6/43f17890/df7f4877/6203ffb9/2569224548/VEsF/ "https://www.theatlantic.com/international/archive/2012/06/heres-a-map-of-the-countries-that-provide-universal-health-care-americas-still-not-on-it/259153/?utm_source=ourrevolution")
**Americans expect more: **[**58% of Americans support Medicare for all.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0ab6/43f17890/df7f4877/6203ffa6/2569224548/VEsC/ "http://www.gallup.com/poll/191504/majority-support-idea-fed-funded-healthcare-system.aspx?utm_source=ourrevolution")**
****[SIGN HERE](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0ab6/43f17890/df7f4877/6203ffb8/2569224548/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/signup/we-support-bernie-sanders-and-medicare-for-all?source=em170328-full")****

>From stopping the nomination of Trump's anti-labor nominee for Labor Secretary, Andy Puzder, to saving the Affordable Care Act and millions of Americans' health care, grassroots supporters like you have stepped up at every occasion and -- to borrow a phrase from the current White House occupant -- won "bigly."

But I need you to keep it up -- and I know you can! -- because we have more to fight for. Just yesterday, Donald Trump signed an executive order that ignores the scientific fact of climate change and gives polluters free rein. And over the next couple months, there are special elections in Georgia and Montana where we have two big chances to turn a red seat in Congress blue. So we need to keep up that high level of energy and action every day to continue winning big victories this year, take back control of Congress in 2018, and win the White House in 2020.

Our first quarterly deadline of the year is this Friday. How much we raise by then will determine how much we can do in the coming months to fight back against Trump and the GOP and get ready for some important elections this year and next year. Will you pitch in $3 or whatever you can now to make sure we have all the resources we need to fight back?

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Another young Democrat needs our help
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e26/738133e4/3331ef07/7f85afa2/3739129615/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com")
---
| Friends, I was 29 years old when I defeated Allen West and began my first term in Congress. As the youngest member of my freshman class, I made it a priority to bring a fresh perspective to Washington to end the extremism and obstructionism that had prevented so much from getting done. Back then, with Barack Obama as president, there was a backstop in place to prevent the Tea Party's damaging policies from becoming law. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in charge of the House and Senate, there is virtually nothing to stop them from passing a devastating budget that attacks the middle class, or the repeal of 24 million Americans' healthcare, or an unconstitutional immigrant ban that risks national security. That is why I am throwing my time and money behind Democrat Jon Ossoff in a special House election in Georgia next month, and you should too. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e26/738133e4/3331ef07/7f85afa3/3739129615/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ossoff-pem?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e26/738133e4/3331ef07/7f85af9c/3739129615/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ossoff-pem?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e26/738133e4/3331ef07/7f85af9d/3739129615/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ossoff-pem?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25")** **[Or, donate another amount](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e26/738133e4/3331ef07/7f85af9e/3739129615/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ossoff-pem?refcode=express_lane_other")** In just a few weeks, a special election will take place in Georgia's 6th congressional district to replace Tom Price, who was Trump's pick to run the Department of Health & Human Services and lead the charge against Obamacare. One of the most far-right members of the house, Price saw his district slip from under him in November - Trump won it just 48%-47% over Hillary Clinton despite Mitt Romney cruising to a 23-point win four years earlier. **If Democrats have any hope of taking back the House in 2018, it starts here in moderate, suburban districts - like the one in Florida I was honored to represent for two terms.** Jon Ossoff is a 30-year-old investigative filmmaker from Atlanta who will stand up for working families and hold the Trump Administration accountable. He's exposed government corruption, worked with our military on cybersecurity efforts, and holds a master's degree from the London School of Economics. Jon's also been enthusiastically backed by civil rights hero John Lewis, who represents a neighboring Georgia district and knows what's at stake in this fight. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e26/738133e4/3331ef07/7f85afa3/3739129615/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ossoff-pem?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e26/738133e4/3331ef07/7f85af9c/3739129615/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ossoff-pem?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e26/738133e4/3331ef07/7f85af9d/3739129615/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ossoff-pem?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25")** **[Or, donate another amount](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e26/738133e4/3331ef07/7f85af9e/3739129615/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ossoff-pem?refcode=express_lane_other")** If we are able to help Jon win - and make no mistake, the right-wing groups are already out with a smear campaign and false attacks ads - it will send the strongest message yet to Donald Trump that the American people want no part of his divisive, destructive agenda. **But it starts with this special election in April. Join me now to help my friend Jon Ossoff and move one step closer to retaking the House.** **[Donate now.](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e26/738133e4/3331ef07/7f85af9f/3739129615/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ossoff-pem?refcode=donatenow")** Thank you again, Patrick |

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

The fake news, Hollywood elites, and Democrats have been distorting the president’s policies and deceiving the American people. And in 2 days, we’ll have to file our critical end-of-quarter deadline report. If we don’t end the first quarter of Trump’s presidency strong, the fake news will use it against us as proof that the American people are not behind the President and that our movement is weakening. We’re counting on patriots like you to show the media that the American people are the heart and soul of this presidency. Please contribute $1 to help us fight back against the media and show them that the American people are UNITED behind our president. And right now, the media can’t wait to get their hands on this fundraising report. But it’s our duty to ensure that we don’t give them any ammo to use against us. Please contribute $1 before our FIRST end-of-quarter to help us fight back against the media’s distortions. On Tuesday, March 28, 2017 at 11:59 AM, MaggieHassan.com
<info@maggiehassan.com> wrote:

We'll cut to the chase, everyone -- Trump and his team are pulling out all of the stops to unseat strong leaders who stand up to his dangerous policies.
**Elizabeth Warren is at the top of his list.** Trump's Massachusetts campaign co-chair, Geoff Diehl, is expected to try to win her seat, and Trump and his money machine are sure to do everything they can to help Diehl unseat her.
**Martin Heinrich will also be one of Trump's targets.** Martin has called on Trump to sever ties with his private business, and he strongly opposed many of Trump's cabinet picks. Trump will fight tooth and nail to force Martin out of the Senate.

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: Total Republican control in 25 states >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dc4/24c69fd9/f2e4dc37/18e3e485/267802650/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE330N_digital_email_20170329_Govs_inact&source=WQEFE330N_digital_email_20170329_Govs_inact")
---

Peter,

We have a problem with Republicans and state government.

Right now Republicans have total control of government in **_25_** states.

It's not just the Deep South (though we need to win there, too). They control the governorships and state legislatures in swing states like New Hampshire, Missouri, Ohio, and Wisconsin as well.

When Republicans have total control of state government, we see waves of anti-choice attacks like Ohio's abortion ban, Indiana's law requiring funerals for miscarriages, and Florida defunding Planned Parenthood.

The good news? There are **_38 governors' races this cycle_** and most state legislatures are having elections, too. We have over 10,000 women throughout the U.S. who've told us they want to run for office, and we've endorsed four women in governors' races already.

**[Turning governorships and state legislatures blue won't be easy. That's why we need to hit our $180,000 End-of-Quarter goal this week. Donate $3 now to help build the infrastructure we need to win in the states.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dc4/24c69fd9/f2e4dc37/18e3e486/267802650/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170325_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Turning+governorships+and+state+legislat&utm_campaign=WQEFE330N_digital_email_20170329_Govs_inact&source=WQEFE330N_digital_email_20170329_Govs_inact")**

It doesn't even take flipping a state legislature AND a governor's office blue to make an impact in a state.

In the same week last year that Florida Governor Rick Scott signed a bill defunding Planned Parenthood, Democratic Governor Terry McAuliffe in Virginia vetoed the Planned Parenthood defunding bill that Republicans sent him. And Republicans don't stop -- McAuliffe vetoed an identical bill just last month!

Flipping a governor's seat can have a massive impact on protecting women and families in a state. That's why we're already endorsing and recruiting for governors' races next year.

**If we're going to protect choice, women, and families, we have to break Republicans' grip on our states. Donate $3 now so we can get to work flipping local seats and governorships:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-The-March-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dc4/24c69fd9/f2e4dc37/18e3e487/267802650/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170325_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitTheMarchGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE330N_digital_email_20170329_Govs_inact&source=WQEFE330N_digital_email_20170329_Govs_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7dc4/24c69fd9/f2e4dc37/18e3e480/267802650/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170325_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE330N_digital_email_20170329_Govs_inact&source=WQEFE330N_digital_email_20170329_Govs_inact")

Friend -- In the last 24 hours:

Republicans gutted FCC internet privacy protections so your personal data can be sold to the highest bidder.

Donald Trump obliterated President Obama's efforts to solve the climate change crisis.

And Paul Ryan announced he'll debut Trumpcare 2.0 to GOP mega-donors this weekend.

So it's on us to show we're not giving up either -- and that we'll fight every fight to block the GOP.

That's a victory we can be proud of, but it's fleeting. As Senate Democrats take a stand, more and more right-wing groups are ramping up millions in attacks against them -- so we mean it when we say we're relying on grassroots Democrats like you to push back.

We can't win the fights ahead alone, friend -- which is why every $1 you chip in makes a difference to show Senate Democrats we have their backs.

name: Democrats.org
subject: On Friday, we're closing the books
body:
Let's sprint through the finish line.
---
**Our first quarterly fundraising deadline of 2017 is on Friday, and we need your help to make sure Democrats have a strong showing. Pitch in $3 or more right now.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca6c/4067b0a/2e32fa753/7e70d3e7/738816543/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170329_lr_nd&source=em_20170329_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170329_lr_nd")**
Friend --

We're getting ready to close the books on the first quarter of 2017 -- but before we do, I wanted to make sure you got the chance to see your supporter record so far this year.

**NAME:** On file
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2017 DONOR:** Not yet
**SUGGESTED ACTION:** **[Donate $3 or more now](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca6c/4067b0a/2e32fa753/7e70d3e4/738816543/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+or+more+now&utm_campaign=em_20170329_lr_nd&source=em_20170329_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170329_lr_nd")**

All year, grassroots supporters like you have fought tooth and nail to power our movement. We have marched. We've protested. We've spoken out at town halls. We've defended Obamacare and pushed back against some of Donald Trump's dangerous and unqualified Cabinet nominations, too.

We've stood united against Trump and the GOP and showed them that we won't back down. We should all be proud of that work -- **[but we have to keep going.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca6c/4067b0a/2e32fa753/7e70d3e5/738816543/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/March-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+but+we+have+to+keep+going&utm_campaign=em_20170329_lr_nd&source=em_20170329_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170329_lr_nd")**

Eventually, we are going to kick Trump out of the White House. But first, we have to continue mobilizing our communities and preparing for victories all over the country between now and 2018 -- in Silver Spring and every place else. And we need your help to get the job done.

So before Friday's deadline, pitch in to help keep our movement going strong.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca6c/4067b0a/2e32fa753/7e70d3e2/738816543/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-march-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170329_lr_nd&source=em_20170329_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170329_lr_nd")

[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ca6c/4067b0a/2e32fa753/7e70d3ee/738816543/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dnc-march-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170329_lr_nd&source=em_20170329_lr_nd&refcode=em_20170329_lr_nd")
